description: Designed for advanced learners of Chinese to improve their Chinese language skills and cultural knowledge. Students will watch and analyze audio-visual media, such as documentary, talk show, movies, etc. In addition, students will make audios/videos to tell stories about themselves, their friends, or others.

optimized_prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 301(or E ASIAN 301 prior to Fall 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 302

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: ASIALANG 301(or E ASIAN 301 prior to Fall 2019) or placement intoASIALANG 302
